message:
fix(tools): clippy warnings + config-based force-release thresholds

contacts.rs:
- Fix clippy::option_if_let_else by using `if let Some(tp)` pattern
- Fix clippy::manual_split_once by using `split_once` for project:<slug>#<Name> parsing

reservations.rs:
- Read force_release inactivity/grace thresholds from Config instead of
  hardcoded 30min/15min values, matching Python's use of
  FILE_RESERVATION_INACTIVITY_SECONDS and FILE_RESERVATION_ACTIVITY_GRACE_SECONDS
  env var overrides

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
